plot outline: The zombie apocalypse has hit Earth. Two personnel from a TV station and two policemen set off in a helicopter to find a safe place to hide out. Their search leads them to a shopping mall where they manage to find a place that, while not zombie-free, is quite secure. So far, so good.
title: Dawn of the Dead
akas: George A. Romero's Dawn of the Dead (United States)
Zombie: Dawn of the Dead (World-wide, English title)

other companies.name: Pennsylvania National Guard (1st Battalion. 10th Field Artillery)
